info.title: beard
info.description: A simple command-line static site generator for .NET Core

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generates a static site from the files in the given directory

options.name: --input
options.description: Provide the root directory where Iron Beard should look for files to generate a static site from.

options.name: --output
options.description: Provide the directory where Iron Beard should write the static site to.

commands.name: watch
commands.description: Watch a directory for changes and rebuild automatically

options.name: --input
options.description: Provide the root directory where Iron Beard should look for files to generate a static site from.

options.name: --output
options.description: Provide the directory where Iron Beard should write the static site to.
